text: Interrupt: When this character is sacrificed - gain 2 fate.
flavorText: "Doom descends on our brothers and sisters on the Wall. I will not wait for help to come when my own stores could mean the difference between life or death."
name: Gallant Quartermaster

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you are less honorable than your opponent - search the top 5 cards of your conflict deck for an attachment, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle.
name: Yasuki Hatsu

text: Reaction: After this character wins a [conflict-military] conflict, your opponent chooses 2 cards in his or her hand - reveal those cards. You choose and discard one of them.
flavorText: "Vitory will only be achieved through preparedness." - Daidoji Uji
name: Daidoji Harrier

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which this character is participating, if you have played 3 or more cards during this conflict, choose another participating character - dishonor that character.
flavorText: "You expect me to fear some unarmed woman?" - Hatsuichi the rōnin
name: Hitsu-do Disciple

text: Disguised Monk. Action: During a conflict in which this character is attacking, if 10 or more cards have been played during this conflict and if the attacked province is not a stronghold province - break that province.
name: Togashi Ichi

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if you have fewer cards in your hand than your opponent, select one - either gain 1 honor, or the attacked province gets -1 strength until the end of the conflict (to a minimum of 0).
name: Hero of Three Trees

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - each event you play during this conflict cannot be canceled.
flavorText: "You must not take offense at my words. Did your Bayushi not name himself a villain?"
name: Persuasive Counselor

text: You may spend fate from this character to pay for Spell cards.
flavorText: "Isawa Koutomo writes as if the Yobanjin could invoke spells without appealing to the kami. Surely this could not be the case?"
name: Student of Esoterica

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a participating character you control - honor that character. If a province is broken during this conflict, sacrifice that character at the end of the conflict.
name: Inferno Guard Invoker

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a card in your opponent's conflict discard pile - put that card on top of its owner's conflict deck.
flavorText: "The Empire cannot survive if it does not have leadership."
name: Chrysanthemum Steward

text: Your opponents cannot have the Imperial Favor. Forced Reaction: After the conflict phase begins - each player draws 2 cards and loses 1 honor.
flavorText: In one clear moment, Shoju understood his unspoken duty, though the touch of polished emerald would forever tarnish his soul.
name: Bayushi Shoju

text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as an attacker, choose a faceup card in a province controlled by your opponent - discard that card.
flavorText: Better this town be left abandoned than run by despots.
name: Golden Plains Raider

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which this character is participating - ready this character.
flavorText: Lands won on horseback ought to be ruled from horseback.
name: Moto Outrider

text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict - discard a random card from your opponent's hand. Until the end of the conflict, reduce the strength of the attacked province by X, where X is the cost of the discarded card.
name: Root Out Heresy

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a participating character - until the end of the conflict, that character cannot be bowed by opponent's card effects. If it is involved in a duel during this conflict, it does not bow as a result of this conflict's resolution.
name: Kakita's Final Stance

text: Reaction: After an opponent declares a [element-air] conflict, choose a Monk character or a character with a Monk attachment – honor that character and draw 1 card.
name: Mantra of Air

text: This card can be played from your discard pile. Action: Bow a (friendly) non-unique character and choose a unique character - ready the chosen character. Put this card on the bottom of its owner's conflict deck.
name: In Service to My Lord

text: Play only if you control a Shugenja character. Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character - until the end of the conflict, that character gets +3 glory and cannot be chosen as the target of opponent's card abilities.
name: Cloak of Night

text: Play only during a [conflict-political] conflict, only on a participating character, and only if you control an Imperial character. If attached character's [conflict-political] skill is 0, discard it. (Do not discard if its skill is a dash.)
name: Castigated

text: Interrupt: When an attack is declared against a non-stronghold facedown province you control, before revealing that province - switch it with another facedown non-stronghold province you control.
name: Know the Terrain
